arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso hints at who he wants to manage next season amid Real Madrid refusal
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso was linked with Liverpool before opting to stay at the club but the possibility of the Real Madrid job continues to linger in the background

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso quizzed about his Leverkusen future at press conference
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso faced several questions about his future at Bayer Leverkusen at a press conference on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga market values: Xavi Simons drops by €10m - Michael Olise now a top-five MVP
arts.sum: The Bundesliga is the last of Europe’s major leagues to receive new market values. Altogether, 149 players playing in Germany’s first division received new market values. While Bayern...
Bayer Leverkusen will be looking to close the gap at the top of the table to just three points when they take on Bochum on Friday evening at BayArena. Xabi…

arts.ttl: Dieter Hecking to recieve a two year contract extension at Bochum – if they avoid relegation
arts.sum: Bochum have announced that head coach Dieter Hecking is set to receive a contract extension at the club, under one condition. Since the arrival of the veteran head coach, Bochum…

arts.ttl: Hecking's Bochum contract to be extended – on one condition
arts.sum: Dieter Hecking's contract as VfL Bochum coach will be extended by a further two years if the club avoid relegation from the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Bochum close to securing Jörg Schmadtke’s administrative services
arts.sum: Germany's main sporting tabloid is treating Jörg Schmadtke's appointment as a VfL Bochum boss to be a mere formality.
